title: Baby Mob Fix
description: With this mod, the textures of baby mobs in Minecraft version 26.1 have been improved and corrected. Their eyes and some textures that some players found disturbing have been corrected.
body:
**This mod attempts to improve baby mob textures without changing their models. It will improve baby mob textures in vanilla Minecraft for those players who disliked their black eyes. You can see what baby mobs will look like with this mod in the mod gallery. Don't forget to pay attention and download the latest versions of the mod, as older versions also have their own bugs and errors. Don't forget to click follow to stay updated on the mod's improvements, including those for baby mobs!**


**If you want to give the mod's author an idea on how else to improve mob textures, join the Discord server. Baby zombies have been improved!**




****

> **Questions for the mod's author**

- _**Do my friends or the server have to download the mod for it to work?**_

_Not necessarily. The mod will work for you even if your friends or the server don't have it. It's a Client mod._

- _**Will the mod be for Quilt and Forge mod loaders?**_

_Yes, but it will take time, the mod is waiting for the release of the Quilt loader for Minecraft version 26.1-26.1.2_
